'''Tyerle''' was a strong-willed [[Gender/Legends|woman]], and the sister of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] agent [[Tay Vanis]].

==Biography==
A native of [[Telfrey]], in the [[Iskalon system/Legends|Iskalon system]], Tyerle and her brother left the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] when they lost the rest of their family after a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] attack in the [[City/Legends|city]]. While Tay fled to nearby [[Iskalon/Legends|Iskalon]], Tyerle went to [[Questal/Legends|Questal]] with her husband, [[Rogan]], trying to escape from the pressures of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]].

Rogan and Tyerle settled in Questal, but it was discovered that the planet was rich in [[Ardanium]], which increased local crime and Imperial attention. Questal was occupied by the Empire, which instated [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Bandor (Moff)|Bandor]] as its ruler. Rogan started resistance cells to oppose Bandor.

However, Bandor managed to capture Rogan and tortured him with a [[Hurlothrumbic Generator]]. Scared, Tyerle asked his brother Tay, by then a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] agent, for help. Vanis tried his best to rescue Rogan, but was himself captured and similarly tortured.

A group of Rebel agents were then sent to rescue both Rogan and Tay Vanis. They managed to do so, and even capture Bandor in the process. Both Tay and Rogan were mindless at the beginning, but they recovered, in part thanks to Tyerle's love.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Game Chambers of Questal]]'' {{Reprint|The Game Chambers of Questal}} {{1st}}
